positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed illustration featuring bioluminescent botanical elements intertwined with cosmic celestial bodies. The centerpiece is a sprawling bouquet of stylized nebula flowers and lunar crescent moons, surrounded by filigree constellations and wisps of stardust. Style is a fusion of intricate etching, vintage Art Nouveau posters, and clean vector graphic design. Strong, deep contrast with limited palette of deep indigo, celestial gold, ethereal teal, and matte white. Composition must be central and medallion-like, perfect for a seamless apparel print. Use clean, strong silhouettes and high-contrast line work. Studio quality, perfect symmetry, 8K.
negative: blurry, poor anatomy, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, trademark, extra limbs, disfigured, lowres, noise, ugly, amateur, border, gradient fade
